name: kostudio-audio-cue
description: Kostudio Audio Cue — Live Performance Sound Manager

scripts.dist-streamdeck: powershell -Command "New-Item -ItemType Directory -Force -Path dist | Out-Null; Copy-Item streamdeck-plugin com.kostudio.audiocue.sdPlugin -Recurse -Force; Compress-Archive -Path .\\com.kostudio.audiocue.sdPlugin -DestinationPath .\\dist\\Kostudio-Audio-Cue.zip -Force; Rename-Item .\\dist\\Kostudio-Audio-Cue.zip Kostudio-Audio-Cue.streamDeckPlugin -Force; Remove-Item com.kostudio.audiocue.sdPlugin -Recurse -Force; Write-Host 'Done: dist/Kostudio-Audio-Cue.streamDeckPlugin'"
scripts.dist-all: npm run dist-win && npm run dist-streamdeck
